summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three timeline enhancements: 75-character track name limits, cross-track event clustering, and vertical scroll synchronization. All major features are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Multi-line track names display with word concatenation instead of proper spacing
ui_bugs.details: Track names like 'ThalassianDominion' should display as 'Thalassian Dominion' with proper word spacing

design_issues.issue: Long track names split into multiple lines but lose word spacing
design_issues.details: The word-splitting algorithm works but concatenates words without spaces

passed_tests: 75-character limit enforced in Add Track form with counter
75-character limit enforced in Edit Track form with counter
Cross-track events section present with clustering logic
Cross-track events display with globe icon indicator
Vertical scroll synchronization between sidebar and timeline
Track creation and editing forms functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix word spacing in multi-line track name display - track names are being split correctly but words are concatenated without spaces (e.g., 'ThalassianDominion' instead of 'Thalassian Dominion')
